concept: Assemble a platformer where the player character consists of a swarm of tiny entities that can form different shapes with unique movement properties. The default humanoid configuration allows basic platforming, while snake formation enables squeezing through narrow passages and sphere formation allows rapid rolling down inclines. Hazards can separate portions of your swarm, temporarily limiting which forms remain available until scattered members are recovered. Environmental puzzles require rapid switching between multiple formations, sometimes maintaining several different configurations simultaneously to activate multiple mechanisms. The narrative reveals your character is actually a collective consciousness piecing itself back together after being forcibly dispersed, with each recovered swarm fragment restoring lost memories.
